NEOWS_BLESSING.title: Neow's Blessing
NEOWS_BLESSING.description: Grants the player their standard Neow's relic reward at the start of a custom run.
ENCHANTER.title: Enchanter
ENCHANTER.description: Card rewards have a random enchantment.
UNMOVABLE_MONSTERS.title: Unmovable Monsters
UNMOVABLE_MONSTERS.description: Monsters gain barricade and plating at the start of combat.
COLORLESS_CARDS.title: Colorless Cards
COLORLESS_CARDS.description: Colorless cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
